features: ✨ Temporary multicolour Glitter Spray – A vibrant blend of gold, pink, purple, blue, green and red glitter for a dazzling sparkle on hair and body. Perfect for adding an extra pop of colour and shine that lasts all day.

🎉 Perfect for Any Occasion – Whether adding sparkle to your everyday look or shining at special events, Hue Waves multicolour glitter spray makes any moment unforgettable. Perfect for birthdays, festivals, concerts, parties, weddings, gifts, and so much more!

🎁 The Perfect Gift - Packaged in a glossy, gift-ready box, Hue Waves multicolour glitter spray is perfect for birthdays, holidays, or a thoughtful treat. A touch of sparkle makes the perfect surprise.
✅ Easy to Apply & Wash Out – Quick-drying and water-resistant, our glitter spray goes on effortlessly and stays put, yet washes out easily when you’re ready for a fresh start.
🌱 Safe for Skin & Hair- Crafted with gentle, cruelty-free ingredients, our multicolour glitter spray is perfect for all hair types and skin tones, offering a vibrant sparkle without irritation.
